_doc: Single-use CSRF tokens get consumed by the first submission. Looping a fuzz step that uses {{csrf}} fails on iteration 2+ because the token's already burnt. Fix: `refresh` block on the loop step re-fetches a fresh token before EACH iteration.

steps._comment: The MAIN loop step. `refresh` re-fetches the CSRF token before each iteration so {{csrf}} is always fresh. Without `refresh`, iterations 2-N would all reuse the iteration-1 token and get rejected.
steps.name: fuzz_each_payload_with_fresh_csrf
